summary: Tested new 'Gestion des Bénévoles' feature in Organizer Hub. All backend CRUD APIs (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE) pass 100%. Frontend VolunteersSection component fully functional with table display, add/edit/delete dialogs, event filter, and search.

backend_volunteers_api.GET /api/organizer/volunteers: PASS - Returns list of all volunteers
backend_volunteers_api.POST /api/organizer/volunteers: PASS - Creates volunteer with all fields (first_name, last_name, phone, email, role_assigned, event_id, notes)
backend_volunteers_api.Predefined roles: PASS - Ravitaillement, Signaleur, Accueil work correctly

frontend_hub_section.Bénévoles hub card: PASS - Shows in Organizer Hub with HeartHandshake icon

frontend_volunteers_section.Back to hub button: PASS - 'RETOUR AU TABLEAU DE BORD' button works
frontend_volunteers_section.Table columns: PASS - NOM, PRENOM, FONCTION, EVENEMENT, TELEPHONE, EMAIL, ACTIONS
frontend_volunteers_section.Event filter dropdown: PASS - Shows 'Tous les evenements' + all events
frontend_volunteers_section.Search input: PASS - Filters by nom, prenom, fonction, telephone
frontend_volunteers_section.Phone links: PASS - Phone numbers are tel: links

frontend_edit_dialog.Fields populated: PASS - Pre-filled with existing volunteer data

frontend_delete_functionality.Delete button: PASS - Red trash icon button per row

seed_data_creation: Pre-existing volunteer: Marie Dupont, Ravitaillement, evt_marathon_lyon
context_for_next_testing_agent: Volunteers management feature fully implemented and tested. Backend: /app/backend/routers/organizer.py lines 524-587. Frontend: /app/frontend/src/components/organizer/VolunteersSection.js. Hub item uses HeartHandshake icon with bg-fuchsia-500. All CRUD operations working. Predefined roles: Ravitaillement, Signaleur, Accueil, Chronometrage, Securite, Logistique, Animation, Medical, Transport, Communication.

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: MOCKED - saves to queue only, not actually sent
